summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Nova AI iteration 7 - Canvas overhaul, mobile optimization, and Stripe integration. Backend: 30/30 tests passed. Frontend: All major features working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend API health check (/api/)
Waitlist count endpoint returns count
User registration creates account and returns JWT token
Duplicate registration returns 400 error
Admin login with admin@nova.ai / admin123 works
Regular user login works
Login with wrong password returns 401
GET /api/auth/me with valid token returns user data
GET /api/auth/me without token returns 401
Studio workflow CRUD - create, list, get, update, delete
Regular user (non-admin) can access /studio
Regular user can create workflows
Workflow endpoints require authentication
Linter scan - clean workflow gets certified (score >= 85)
Linter detects exposed API keys (score penalty)
Stripe checkout requires authentication
Stripe checkout (rent) creates real Stripe session
Stripe checkout (buy) creates real Stripe session
Stripe checkout requires origin_url
Stripe checkout with invalid agent returns 404
Payment status endpoint returns session info
Payment status with invalid session returns 404
Webhook endpoint exists and handles requests
Marketplace search by query string
Marketplace search by category filter
Get agents list returns 6+ agents
Get agent detail returns correct data
Get creators returns 5 creators with is_supernova field
Creator profile includes is_supernova field
Frontend Home page loads with waitlist counter visible
Frontend Login page has login/signup/forgot modes
Frontend Signup form creates account and redirects to /studio
Frontend Navbar shows 'Log out' for authenticated users
Frontend Studio - Desktop has 2 modes (Vibe, Node)
Frontend Studio - Mobile has 3 modes (Vibe, Node, Code)
Frontend Studio Canvas - Zoom in/out/reset buttons work
Frontend Studio Canvas - Add Node dropdown shows 8 node types
Frontend Studio Canvas - All 8 node types available (trigger, llm, condition, action, http_request, webhook, database, transform)
Frontend Studio Canvas - Nodes are draggable via mouse
Frontend Studio Canvas - Delete node button removes node and edges
Frontend Studio Canvas - Nodes auto-connect with edges
Frontend Studio Code pane - Shows generated JSON from nodes/edges
Frontend Studio Code pane - Copy button works
Frontend Studio Code pane - Scan runs linter
Frontend Studio Code pane - Deploy saves and runs linter
Frontend Studio Workflow selector - Switch between workflows
Frontend Studio Workflow selector - Create new workflow
Frontend Mobile Home - Page stacks correctly on 390px viewport
Frontend Mobile Home - Waitlist counter visible
Frontend Mobile Home - Hamburger menu works
Frontend Mobile Marketplace - Category pills scroll horizontally
Frontend Mobile Marketplace - Agent cards stack single column
Frontend Mobile Studio - Shows 3-tab mode toggle (Vibe/Node/Code)
Frontend Mobile Studio - Single pane displayed at a time
Frontend Agent Detail - Rent/Buy buttons visible
Frontend Agent Detail - Unauthenticated users see 'Please log in' toast
Frontend Agent Detail - Authenticated users redirect to Stripe checkout
Frontend Payment Success - Shows loading state while polling
Frontend Payment Success - Shows error state for invalid sessions

test_credentials.test_user: Created during testing with unique timestamps

seed_data_creation: Database already seeded with 6 agents, 5 creators, reviews, and waitlist entries
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features from iteration 7 are working. New features tested: 1) Draggable canvas with pan/zoom - nodes can be dragged, zoom buttons work, canvas pans on background drag. 2) Mobile optimization - 3-tab mode toggle on mobile (Vibe/Node/Code), single pane display, hamburger menu works. 3) Stripe integration - checkout creates real Stripe sessions (test mode), payment status polling works, webhook endpoint exists. Studio Vibe Mode chat uses MOCKED AI responses (generateAssistantResponse function) - not real LLM integration.

mocked_apis.Studio Vibe Mode AI chat: Uses local generateAssistantResponse function that creates nodes based on keywords like 'refund', 'sales', 'escalation', 'api'. This is NOT a real LLM integration - it's a deterministic pattern matcher.
mocked_apis.Stripe: Uses test key sk_test_emergent which creates real Stripe checkout sessions but in test mode (sandbox).
